title: lonchocarpus parviflorus
intro: Lonchocarpus parviflorus, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus parviflorus are said to include reducing blood pressure, alleviating fever and pain, and aiding in the treatment of kidney stones and other urinary tract issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as tinctures, teas, and capsules, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
